############## ADP_353  dataset Description#########################################################
#         ADP_353 is a dataset of 353 Non-redundant PDB chain of ADP interacting protein chains.
#         This dataset is generated by Blastclust (25%) and LPC software.
#         PDB resolution is maximum 3 Angstrom and PDB chain length is minimum 80 amino acid.
#         and interaction distance (distance between ADP - amino acid interaction) is 0-4.0 Angstrom.
#         There are three line in each PDB, First line is PDB ID with chain,
#         Second is  amino acid sequence in single letter code
#         and third line is assignment of ADP at each amino acid residue
#         corresponding to amino acid of respective PDB sequence, where plus (+) sign indicate
#         the corresponding amino acid occur in ADP interacting site  while sign(-) indicates
#         non ADP interacting amino acid residues.
#################### Dataset Description end    ##################################################
>1ao0A
